description.value: Channel necrotic entropy into a living creature or plant, withering tissue and draining vitality. Against plants and plant creatures, this weave is devastating; they make no save and take full damage. Against other living creatures, target makes [[/save type=fortitude]].

system.effect: Channel necrotic entropy into a living creature or plant, withering tissue and draining vitality. Against plants and plant creatures, this weave is devastating; they make no save and take full damage. Against other living creatures, target makes Fortitude save.

2.description: Full damage (20) + Weakened condition until end of target's next turn
2.duration: Full damage (20) + Weakened condition until end of target's next turn

3.description: Enhanced damage (28) + Weakened condition for 1 minute (Fortitude save at end of each turn
3.duration: Enhanced damage (28) + Weakened condition for 1 minute (Fortitude save at end of each turn

system.targetingSuccessScaling: 0 = Fails,  1 = Half damage (10), 2 = Full damage (20) + Weakened condition until end of target's next turn, 3 = Enhanced damage (28) + Weakened condition for 1 minute (Fortitude save at end of each turn, 1 success ends)
system.weavingRoll: Negative Potential + Negative Mastery / Space Potential + Space Mastery
